name: HRFlow Employee Services Agent
description: Handles day-to-day employee HR needs: policy queries, leave management, payslips, support tickets, and leave approvals.

skills.name: Search HR Policy
skills.description: Search company HR policy handbook for answers.

skills.name: Request Leave
skills.description: Submit a leave request for an employee.

skills.name: Check Leave Balance
skills.description: Check remaining leave days for an employee.

skills.name: Raise Ticket
skills.description: Create an HR support ticket. Harassment/safety auto-escalate.

skills.name: Get Payslip
skills.description: Retrieve monthly payslip data for an employee.

skills.name: Approve Leave
skills.description: Approve or reject a pending leave request (Manager/HR only).
